This potential can be utilized in various applications, ranging from edible food wrap to extend the shelf life of food to use in health products. In addition, utilizing extracts from passion fruit peel waste supports the principle of sustainability by utilizing waste into high-value products, reduce environmental impacts, and supporting a circular economy.
